Features

🎚️

Per-Domain Control

Set unique volume levels for each website independently

🔗

Smart Grouping

All tabs from the same site share one volume slider

🔇

Instant Mute

One-click mute without losing your volume setting

💾

Persistent Settings

Your preferences are saved automatically across sessions

⭐

Unlimited Domains PRO

Control volume on unlimited websites with Pro license

About

Volux is a premium volume controller that lets you set individual volume levels for each website. Perfect for balancing audio between video calls, music, and other media.
